data.description: North Dakota oil output down 80k-110k b/d due to the cold.

data.title: MDA Space and Hanwha sign MOU for Korean military constellation program, aiming to advance next-gen satellite solutions.
data.description: Brampton-based MDA Space has joined forces with Gumi-si, Gyeongsangbuk-do in South Korea to enhance advanced satellite solutions for the national defense system. The partnership, announced on Jan. 26, 2026, marks a significant move in bolstering Korea's defense infrastructure. MDA Space, a leader in the space industry trading on the TSX under the symbol MDA, will work closely with partners in South Korea to drive innovations in satellite technology. This collaboration aligns with Korea's commitment to strengthening its defense capabilities and underscores the global significance of the initiative.

data.title: NRG Energy cleared to acquire 18 gas facilities and VPP platform from LS Power after DOJ antitrust approval on Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: In Houston today, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) revealed its reception of antitrust approval from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for the acquisition of 18 natural gas generation facilities and a commercial and industrial virtual power plant platform (C&I VPP) from LS Power. This approval was obtained on January 23, 2026. Prior to this, NRG had already secured green lights from the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) and the New York State PUC.

data.title: Rimini Street (Nasdaq: RMNI) to announce Q4 & FY 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026 at 5pm Eastern, hosting a webcast.
data.description: Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), a prominent third-party support provider for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, will be releasing its earnings report on February 19, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific time to discuss the company's performance in the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, as well as its outlook for 2026. The event will provide a live webcast for interested parties to tune in.
White House press Secretary Leavitt ends the briefing.

data.title: Antares' Mark-0 reactor receives DOE safety approval for demonstration, set to achieve criticality by July 4, 2026.
data.description: Antares, a nuclear fission energy company based in Idaho Falls, has received approval from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) for its Preliminary Documented Safety Analysis (PDSA) concerning the Mark-0 reactor. The Mark-0 reactor is Antares' inaugural demonstration reactor, set to attain criticality by July 4, 2026, as part of the DOE’s Reactor Pilot Program. This approval marks a significant step forward for Antares in developing microreactors for defense and space applications. The DOE's certification of the PDSA paves the way for the reactor's progress.

data.title: Investors alerted as Hagens Berman investigates CPNG data breach of 33.7 million accounts and disclosure delays.
data.description: Attorney Reed Kathrein is looking into claims of "Proactive Security" in response to a former employee having 6 months of undetected access. In San Francisco, on January 26th, 2026, national law firm Hagens Berman is alerting investors of Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG) about an upcoming milestone in February.

data.title: Dimora Medical named Amazon Best Seller in Wound Dressings for 4th year. Leader in high-end medical care supplies.
data.description: In New York, Dimora Medical, known for its cutting-edge medical care supplies, has been recognized as a 2025 Amazon Best Seller in the Wound Dressings category. This achievement marks the fourth consecutive year that Dimora Medical has received this accolade, showcasing the brand's consistent popularity among consumers. This recognition highlights Dimora Medical's ongoing success in the market, solidifying its position as a top performer in the industry.

data.title: Dr. Anissa Broussard of Digital Floss wins 2025 Nifty Thrifty Award, lauded by 60,000+ dental pros for innovative marketing.
data.description: Dr. Anissa Broussard, the founder and CEO of Digital Floss, has been acknowledged by over 60,000 dental professionals for revolutionizing how dentists engage with patients using genuine marketing and AI-enhanced tactics. The recognition was received on January 26, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.

data.title: Dow Jones rises despite Trump's tariff threat on Canada. Tesla stock falls, CoreWeave surges on Nvidia news.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase despite President Trump's warning of potential new tariffs on Canada. Tesla's stock experienced a decline, contrasting with CoreWeave which saw a significant rise. The market also witnessed gold reaching a milestone. CoreWeave surged following an announcement by Nvidia. The day showcased a mix of fluctuations in the market, with notable movements in various stocks.

data.title: Ethereum active addresses hit all-time high of 718,000 on 7-day moving average, signaling potential bullish price gains as network activity soars. ETH up 3% but hasn't broken out of range yet. Network growth precedes price appreciation historically. Network vibrant, market hasn't repriced ETH to reflect it yet.
data.description: The number of active addresses on the Ethereum network, symbolized as ETH in the cryptocurrency market, has reached an all-time high of 718,000 based on the 7-day moving average. This surge in active addresses indicates significant user demand and network engagement. Despite Ethereum consolidating, this rise in active addresses forms a bullish divergence, historically hinting at potential price increases. Currently, Ethereum's price has remained stable, with a 3% increase today, but it has not broken out of its established range. The substantial network activity suggests a growing adoption of Layer-2 solutions, increased decentralized finance (DeFi) actions, or a rise in retail investor interest. The market has yet to adjust Ethereum's price to reflect this heightened network activity. Analysts speculate that this divergence could forecast a forthcoming bullish price trend, as network expansion commonly precedes price appreciation, strengthening the cryptocurrency's fundamental utility. Bloomberg's Mike McGlone also acknowledges these indicators.

data.title: National Mango Board seeking 6 board members for 2027-2029 term to boost mango industry in US.
data.description: Today in Orlando, Florida, the National Mango Board has initiated the selection process for potential candidates to serve on the board, with six (6) positions available for the term 2027-2029. The key focus of the board is to promote and increase the consumption of fresh mangos across the United States.

data.title: Zinzino merges with It Works! for improved distribution in North America and Europe, in all-share deal.
data.description: In Sweden on January 26, 2026, Zinzino announced a merger with the US direct sales company It Works! in an all-share transaction. The agreement was closed on the same day, with Zinzino acquiring the operational assets of It Works! in the US. This merger marks a significant move for Zinzino as it expands its market reach and portfolio.

data.title: Monetary Metals alerts clients about gold lease with AgaBullion in Turkey amid gov't scrutiny.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Monetary Metals informed its clients about its gold lease partnership with AgaBullion Kiymetli Madenler A.Ş. in Turkey. The Turkish government officials have been in discussions regarding this agreement.

data.title: AI nutrition app Caloria launched by endocrinologist Dr. Eiriny Eskander offers insights for GLP-1 users, diabetes, PCOS, menopause.
data.description: Dr. Eiriny Eskander, a board-certified endocrinologist, has introduced Caloria to provide expert guidance to individuals navigating the use of GLP-1 medications for conditions such as diabetes, PCOS, and menopause. The service offers insights supported by physicians. The launch of Caloria was announced in Los Angeles on Jan. 26, 2026. This service comes as a response to the increasing number of individuals, amounting to millions, who are utilizing GLP-1 medications for various health concerns.
